confirmed_contract: Each candidate is positioned first, then accepted from the concrete entity bounding box when the block below has a solid top, the bounding box has no collisions, and it intersects no liquid. TC4 does not require a hard-coded two-block air column.
production_fix: WarpEvents.findSpawnAround removes fixed pos/pos.above air checks, evaluates level.noCollision(entity), scans fluids intersecting the entity AABB, and routes the decision through TC4WarpRuntimeParity.acceptsEntitySpawnCandidate.
